name: global dry-run: /pr-source-add --dry-run shows planned scaffold without writing PR-SOURCES.yaml or folder file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" --github cfpb/x --id cfpb-x --source-class federal-financial-regulator --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run && [ ! -s .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml ] && [ ! -d tree/us-government ] && echo ok 1>&2
